changed: Desk now active with 3 long takes (CWAN half, ANNX quarter, IOVA quarter) — prior scan had nothing actionable.

caveats: AH/Pre-market scan as of 05:39 ET 2026-06-24 — prices are pre-RTH and may gap significantly at open.
